description: Figure 2 Neostagonosporellasichuanensis (MFLU 18-1212, holotype). a аppearance of ascostromata on host b ascostroma c, d vertical section of ascostroma e, f close up of ascoma g peridium h trabeculate pseudoparaphyses and asci i–k asci l bitunicate asci, note ocular chamber m, n, q, r ascospores with mucilaginous sheath o, s germinated ascospores in lactate cotton blue reagent p, t colonies on PDA (p-from above, t-from below). Scale bars: 1 cm (a); 1 mm (b); 200 μm (c, d); 100 μm (e, f); 20 μm (g–k); 10 μm (l–o, q–s).
